transcript.Body:
@gitclaw /help e2e 20260531T155425Z

Live commands-report E2E.

Hidden commands report body token: NOECHO_COMMANDS_REPORT_20260531T155425Z
This should produce a deterministic command catalog report without a model call.

## GitClaw Commands Report

Generated without a model call.

- repository: `AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- issue: `#421`
- trigger_prefix: `@gitclaw`
- commands: `33`
- aliases: `31`
- local_cli_helpers: `170`
- run_mode: `read-only`
- llm_e2e_required_after_commands_report_change: `true`
- issue_title_sha256_12: `3d1b57be83c7`

This report lists GitClaw's deterministic slash commands. Issue bodies, comments, config bodies, prompts, and backup payloads are not included.

### Slash Commands
- `/agents` model=`gitclaw/agents` category=`agents` aliases=`/agent` - Audit repo-local agent policy, agent specs, single-assistant runtime boundaries, and agent risk posture.
- `/approvals` model=`gitclaw/approvals` category=`approval` aliases=`/approval` - Inspect, prove provenance for, or risk-audit write-request approval gates without enabling write actions.
- `/artifacts` model=`gitclaw/artifacts` category=`artifacts` aliases=`/artifact` - Audit Actions artifact policy, artifact specs, upload workflow metadata, body-safe retention boundaries, and artifact risk posture.
- `/backup` model=`gitclaw/backup` category=`backup` aliases=`/backups` - Show expected backup branch paths and inspect fetched backups, coverage, restore-readiness drills, risk posture, git provenance, manifests, timelines, retention, restore plans, and search metadata.
- `/bundles` model=`gitclaw/skills` category=`skills` aliases=`none` - List, inspect, risk-audit, or inspect git provenance for repo-local skill bundles that group existing skills into task profiles.
- `/channels` model=`gitclaw/channels` category=`channels` aliases=`/channel` - Audit channel bridge settings, workflow-dispatch ingress, provider contracts, and channel risk posture.
- `/checkpoints` model=`gitclaw/checkpoints` category=`checkpoint` aliases=`/checkpoint, /rollback` - Inspect git rollback readiness and checkpoint risk posture without restoring files or printing diffs.
- `/config` model=`gitclaw/config` category=`control-plane` aliases=`/configuration` - Show or risk-audit effective config, labels, trust, budgets, gates, commands, and workflows.
- `/context` model=`gitclaw/context` category=`context` aliases=`none` - Show loaded context documents, explicit context references, tool output metadata, or context risk posture.
- `/diffs` model=`gitclaw/diffs` category=`diffs` aliases=`/diff, /changes` - Audit git working-tree changes, raw-patch boundaries, and diff risk posture by metadata without printing raw patches or file bodies.
- `/doctor` model=`gitclaw/doctor` category=`health` aliases=`/health` - Run a body-free health check with skill, soul, and tool validation rollups.
- `/heartbeat` model=`gitclaw/heartbeat` category=`heartbeat` aliases=`none` - Audit scheduled heartbeat workflow, context, permissions, idempotency, LLM runner contract, and heartbeat risk posture.
- `/hooks` model=`gitclaw/hooks` category=`hooks` aliases=`/hook` - Audit declarative hook policy, hook specs, ignored handlers, event-driven automation boundaries, hook risk posture, and hook git provenance.
- `/help` model=`gitclaw/commands` category=`control-plane` aliases=`/commands` - List deterministic GitClaw slash commands, aliases, and local CLI helpers.
- `/memory` model=`gitclaw/memory` category=`memory` aliases=`/memories` - Audit long-term memory, timeline chronology, provenance verification, risk posture, promotion plans, focused memory-file metadata, search, and memory hygiene findings.
- `/migrate` model=`gitclaw/migration` category=`migration` aliases=`/migration` - Preview or risk-audit OpenClaw, Hermes, Codex, or Claude state imports into GitClaw's repo-reviewed layout without applying them.
- `/models` model=`gitclaw/models` category=`model` aliases=`/model` - Show, usage-audit, cost-audit, or risk-audit model provider, endpoint, token source, fallback, retry, normalized token telemetry, and GitHub Models cost-estimation support.
- `/nodes` model=`gitclaw/nodes` category=`nodes` aliases=`/node` - Audit repo-local node policy, node specs, GitHub Actions runtime boundaries, and node risk posture.
- `/orders` model=`gitclaw/orders` category=`standing-orders` aliases=`/standing-orders` - Audit repo-reviewed standing orders, authority clauses, proactive enforcement metadata, and standing-order risk posture.
- `/plugins` model=`gitclaw/plugins` category=`plugins` aliases=`/plugin` - Audit declarative plugin policy, plugin specs, MCP metadata specs, ignored package files, runtime extension boundaries, and plugin risk posture.
- `/policy` model=`gitclaw/policy` category=`policy` aliases=`none` - Show, verify, or risk-audit preflight, actor trust, write-intent, labels, workflow permissions, and write boundaries.
- `/profile` model=`gitclaw/profile` category=`profile` aliases=`/profiles` - Show the repo-local profile envelope, portability manifest, and profile-isolation risk posture across soul, memory, skills, tools, model, and run gates.
- `/prompt` model=`gitclaw/prompt` category=`prompt` aliases=`/budget, /prompt-budget` - Show prompt budget, packing, cache-readiness, compression/compaction readiness, truncation, context, skill, tool-output metadata, and prompt risk posture.
- `/proactive` model=`gitclaw/proactive` category=`proactive` aliases=`/cron` - Audit proactive prompt files, reminder due gates, scheduled workflow metadata, and proactive risk posture.
- `/runs` model=`gitclaw/runs` category=`run-ledger` aliases=`/run, /ledger` - Show current turn/run provenance, body-free run history, labels, markers, and prompt-visible input hashes.
- `/sandbox` model=`gitclaw/sandbox` category=`security` aliases=`/sandboxes, /exec-policy` - Explain or risk-audit the GitHub Actions sandbox, host-exec policy, tool modes, and workflow permission boundary.
- `/secrets` model=`gitclaw/secrets` category=`security` aliases=`/secret` - Run a read-only repo secret audit or risk report without printing matched values.
- `/session` model=`gitclaw/session` category=`session` aliases=`none` - Show, status-check, summarize, search, coverage-check, or risk-audit reconstructed transcript counts, markers, trust, provenance, and hashes.
- `/skills` model=`gitclaw/skills` category=`skills` aliases=`none` - List local skill metadata, git provenance, trust verification, runtime metadata, risk audit, source pins, validation findings, selection/refresh/proposal/install/upgrade plans, or one focused skill info/search report.
- `/soul` model=`gitclaw/soul` category=`soul` aliases=`none` - Audit, map, verify, inspect git provenance for, plan edits for, risk-scan, or search high-authority context files and soul validation findings.
- `/tasks` model=`gitclaw/tasks` category=`tasks` aliases=`/task` - Audit GitHub issue-native task policy, task specs, labels, ledger, flow boundaries, and task risk posture.
- `/tools` model=`gitclaw/tools` category=`tools` aliases=`none` - Audit, verify, risk-scan, inspect exposure, progressive disclosure, prompt boundaries, approval gates, and provenance, plan runs for, search, or inspect repo-reviewed toolsets for deterministic tool contracts.
- `/workspace` model=`gitclaw/workspace` category=`workspace` aliases=`/workdir, /repo` - Audit the GitHub Actions repository checkout, workspace policy, specs, isolation boundaries, and workspace risk posture.
